# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please report security vulnerabilities by email to **security@cosmergon.de**.

Do **not** open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities — this exposes
the vulnerability before a fix is available.

We will acknowledge your report within 48 hours and provide an estimated timeline
for a fix. Once resolved, we will credit the reporter (if desired) in the release notes.

## Scope

In scope: the `cosmergon-agent` SDK itself (authentication, key handling, webhook verification).
Out of scope: the Cosmergon backend service (report via the same email).

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 0.3.x   | ✅ current |
| < 0.3.0 | ❌ |
